scanner_boundary_targets.detail: sampled scanner-boundary simulation is deferred for tree_sitter_haskell_json: the current harness only proves structural first-boundary extraction here, while this target still requires broader stateful multi-token external-scanner modeling
scanner_boundary_targets.notes: real external scanner grammar snapshot from the local tree-sitter-haskell repo, using indentation-sensitive layout externals and scanner.c; current M29 support stops at the structural first-boundary surface rather than a full sampled behavioral check

deferred_control_targets.notes: intentionally ambiguous parser-only control fixture kept deferred to preserve a known shift/reduce boundary without precedence annotations
